metricDataRows.annotationText:
Definition:

Average of the count of unique users who were active with any Extension over a rolling 7-day period.

Definition:

Count of unique users who were active with any Extension over a rolling 7-day period.

Definition:

Count of unique users who were active with any Extension over a rolling 28-day period.

Definition:

Ratio of the average RL28 DAU divided by the RL28 MAU for the selected month.

Definition:

Count of unique combinations of Extensions and users over a rolling 7-day period.

E.g.: User Ux uses Extensions E1 and E2, User Uy uses Extensions E1 and E2 -> Extension-user pairs = 4 [E1-Ux, E1-Uy, E2-Ux, E2-Uy]

Definition:

Total Agent Metering/Billing Consumption Units in a RL1 period.

Definition:

Total Agent Metering/Billing Consumption Units in a RL7 period.

Definition:

Total Agent Metering/Billing Consumption Units in a RL28 period.

Definition:

Count of Responses over a rolling 7-day period.

Extensibility response = Copilot's Response (to a user prompt) containing at least one Extension Impression/citation.

Definition:

Count of Extensions which had 1 or more Active users in the rolling 7-day period.

Definition:

Count of weekly Extensibility Responses divided by Weekly Active Users.

Extensibility response = Copilot's Response (to a user prompt) containing at least one Extension Impression/citation.

Definition:

Average number of days that users were active on Copilot Extensions over a rolling reporting period.

Definition:

User Attach Rate is defined as total Extensibility Active users in a rolling 7-day period divided by total Copilot Chat Active users in that reporting period.

Definition:

Total thumbs-down feedback divided by total feedback (thumbs-up + thumbs-down), regardless of whether written feedback was submitted. Calculated over a rolling 7-day window.

Definition:

Returning Users from the previous week divided by the total Active users in that week.

Definition:

A user who:

(1) has received at least 1 Extensibility response during the current time window -> Active in current time window.

(2) has received at least 1 Extensibility response during the adjacent previous time window. -> NOT active in any time before current time window.

Definition:

A user who:

(1) has received at least 1 Extensibility response during the current time window -> Active in current time window.

(2) has NOT received any Extensibility response before the current time window. -> NOT active in any time before current time window.

Definition:

A user who:

(1) has received at least 1 Extensibility response during the current time window.

(2) has NOT received any Extensibility response during the adjacent previous time window.

(3) The user has received at least 1 Extensibility response before the adjacent previous time window.

Definition:

A user who:

(1) has not received any Extensibility response during the current time window.

(2) has received an Extensibility response during the adjacent previous time window.

Definition:

Average of the count of unique users who were active with any Extension over a rolling 7-day period.

Definition:

Count of unique users who were active with any Extension over a rolling 7-day period.

Definition:

Count of unique users who were active with any Extension over a rolling 28-day period.

Definition:

Definition:
